# BioKhoj — X/Twitter Posts

## Long-form post (X Premium — no character limit)

🔬 **BioKhoj** — Free browser extension that monitors PubMed for your genes, drugs & variants and ranks papers by relevance.

"Khoj" (खोज) means "search/discovery" in Hindi.

**The problem:** Checking PubMed every morning for the same genes and drugs is tedious. PubMed email alerts are unranked and noisy. You need a smarter filter.

**How BioKhoj works:**
• Add entities to your watchlist — genes (BRCA1, TP53), drugs (olaparib), variants (rs1801133), diseases, pathways, or any topic
• BioKhoj checks PubMed every 4 hours in the background
• Each paper gets a 0-100 signal score based on: recency, journal tier, entity match strength, co-mentions, citation velocity, and author reputation
• High-scoring papers trigger notifications so you never miss what matters

**Features:**
📡 Ranked paper feed with date grouping and signal bars
👁 Watchlist manager with preset entity packs
🔍 Multi-database search — PubMed, NCBI Gene, ClinVar, ClinicalTrials.gov, UniProt — all at once
🔥 Trending preprints from bioRxiv, medRxiv, PubMed, Europe PMC
📚 Reading list with BibTeX, RIS, Markdown, CSV export
🖱 Right-click any text → "Watch in BioKhoj" adds it to your watchlist
⌨ Keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Shift+K toggle, j/k navigate, 1-4 switch tabs)
🌗 Dark and light themes

**Also available as a PWA** at lang.bio/biokhoj with trends charts, weekly digest, journal club tools, and more export formats (pandas DataFrame, R tibble).

**Privacy:** Zero data collection. API calls go directly from your browser to PubMed/bioRxiv. No proxy server, no analytics, no account required. All data stays on your device.

**Limitations:** Checks run while the browser is open — not a server-side service. When you close the browser, checks pause and resume next time you open it.

**Install (free, all browsers):**
🟡 Chrome → https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/biokhoj/joabebeooikdbjnheamlbcnjlodoaflb
🟠 Firefox → https://addons.mozilla.org/addon/biokhoj
🔵 Edge → https://microsoftedge.microsoft.com/addons/detail/pehdloipblabliilcdagdgimodipepap
🌐 PWA → https://lang.bio/biokhoj

Built by ORIC Labs → https://oriclabs.com
Feedback & bugs → https://github.com/oriclabs/biolang/issues
